install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y python3-pip build-essential patchelf curl git libgl1-mesa-dev libgl1-mesa-glx libglew-dev libosmesa6-dev software-properties-common net-tools vim virtualenv wget xpra xserver-xorg-dev && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/root/.mujoco/mujoco210/bin:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH} MUJOCO_GL=egl python -c "
import gym, d4rl
envs = [
  'halfcheetah-medium-v2', 'halfcheetah-medium-replay-v2', 'halfcheetah-medium-expert-v2',
  'hopper-medium-v2', 'hopper-medium-replay-v2', 'hopper-medium-expert-v2',
  'walker2d-medium-v2', 'walker2d-medium-replay-v2', 'walker2d-medium-expert-v2',
  'maze2d-large-v1', 'maze2d-medium-v1', 'maze2d-umaze-v1',
  'pen-human-v1', 'pen-cloned-v1', 'pen-expert-v1',
  'door-human-v1', 'door-cloned-v1', 'door-expert-v1',
  'hammer-human-v1', 'hammer-cloned-v1', 'hammer-expert-v1',
]
for name in envs:
  try:
    env = gym.make(name)
    d4rl.qlearning_dataset(env)
    print('Downloaded:', name)
  except Exception as e:
    print('WARN: Failed', name, e)
"

mkdir -p /root/.d4rl/datasets && cd /root/.d4rl/datasets && for f in pen-human-v1 pen-cloned-v1 pen-expert-v1 door-human-v1 door-cloned-v1 door-expert-v1 hammer-human-v1 hammer-cloned-v1 hammer-expert-v1; do [ -f ${f}.hdf5 ] && [ -s ${f}.hdf5 ] || wget -q http://rail.eecs.berkeley.edu/datasets/offline_rl/hand_dapg_v1/${f}.hdf5; done && ls -lh /root/.d4rl/datasets/
